reviews.review_title: This used to be so fun
reviews.review_description:
but now its broke so i can only play against bots
Update: now i cant even play. Cuz sevres are down

I just bought this game because it looked pretty fun, But when I joined the game, it kept saying “network connection failed” or something like that. My internet was on and nothing worked. Please don’t buy this game.
Doesn't even let you load into a private lobby the servers are completely shut down

I played this game on day one and I just returned to play it again but there are absolutely no players anymore, and the last update got released over a year ago. 1but the game play and movement are fire. Also since I played the beta when it was free iv had it free the entire time

reviews.review_title: Was I ALONE, only againt bots? HELP! :'(
reviews.review_description: Hi, I saw you offer by 1€, I bought it but.... I was ALONE, when finally I could fight with someone was because I check "with bots", no people there, I couldn't neither increase the difficulty fot those bots, Did I do something wrong? I like your game visually, even your movements, no motion sickness as well, blablabla, but I don't like to play ALONE, Could you tell me someting about this developers? If I don't get any answer, unfortunatelly I will request refound for my money, it's a pity, THANKS!! :''((((
Game is DEAD
I can never find anybody multiplayer to play this game. I got it for free the game collecting dust

This game is amazing, it could be so much more popular but the devs stopped updating for like 10 months and everyone quit, I see reviews telling people “DoNt BuY ThIS GaMe, nO oNe PlAyS.” yea and it’s gonna be like that if you keep on convincing people to not buy it 😭, buy this game if you want, if enough people do then the community will be received and the devs will actually do something again, also the game just got updated so it’s available on pico, more people have it now cause of that, also tell people how good this game is if you want to revive the community.
As soon as I got it I tried joining a lobby and it just loaded me back too the main screen I tried a few more times nothing works in my opinion DON’T get the game. WASTE OF MONEY

reviews.review_title: Dragon told me to do this
reviews.review_description:
Hello their,
My name is Awesome and Im a Stack mod. This game is good, like really good. So get it now. Hello Domie, Badster, Cdd, Sick.
I’m so excited to see where this game goes!

This game is awesome! But there’s one big issue… THE GAME CANNOT BE PLAYED IF YOU’RE LEFT HANDED! I understand that most games focus on right handed control schemes because most people are right handed but the dev could of put more effort on making the game more playable for lefty’s like myself. My main problem is that when you select your dominant hand as left all of the controls are mirrored! This could be all fixed if you kept the left stick as the movement stick and the right one as the camera. Or even better yet make the controls changeable. The only other problem I have is that I’m the tutorial the instructions don’t change, so I was stuck not being able to slingshot the disk because it said to use my right trigger. But if you are right handed this game truly is a hidden hem.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thank you for sharing your experience with our game. We are glad to hear that you find the game awesome, but we're sorry to hear that the control scheme doesn't work well for left-handed players. We understand your opinion. Thank you again for your feedback, and please let us know if you have any further suggestions or issues. We value all of our players and want to ensure that everyone has an enjoyable experience with our game.

reviews.review_description: After spending some time in this game, I can easily say it is very fun and engaging. That said, the throwing, sling shot and "combat" mechanics are not very intuitive. Please add additional instruction and/or practice arenas to learn the mechanics. It's hard to learn the mechanics in actual matches.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thank you for taking the time to review our game and for your feedback. We are thrilled to hear that you are finding the game fun and engaging!

reviews.review_title: Why this is the best game
reviews.review_description: This game is a very good game. I could play it for hours. It sucks that not many people know about this game because there’s not that much servers really fun game has the combat of echo VR, and feels like Tron lot more people should know about this game and I wish it does good in the future I would be very grateful to compete in one of your tournaments

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words :3 We're working on bringing more people in, stay tuned for the first tournament next month!

reviews.review_description: hyped for the full game if it comes out
For the game being in development it’s really good and has amazing mechanics I can’t even compare end how good this will be when it’s done
I did not expect much from beta but Joy Way… the devs are great!

The game has potential. Like you have probably heard. But right now I find myself getting bored really quickly. Me and my friends found it very hard to hit each other. And the movement in the game is janky. We would always get stuck under something and eventually just fall.

MY IDEAS FOR THE GAME 
I think something like a dash mechanism would be good. You would day in the direction that your hand was at making it easier to escape the bottom of the map. A little aim assist because it is really hard to hit my friends. And if you added better graphics.

Questions 
can you send me the link the the stack discord 
and is the game gonna be free

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your experience! If you have any ideas how to make the game better, please, join our discord server and post it there. We will discuss the ideas with the team!

reviews.review_description: I got this game today and it’s really fun. But the one problem is that there is not that many players yet. So maybe until there is one could you add bots to servers so your not waiting for nobody

developer_response.body: Hey! In the last version og the game the match starts when the waiting time is 4 minutes and there are at least 2 players in the public lobby. You no longer need to wait for more people to start the game. Also you can join the STACK discord server https://discord.gg/stackvr and share your private lobby codes in the #looking-for-party channel.

reviews.review_description: Like some other reviewers, I've been looking for a game that feels like the Disc Wars from TRON for a while now. And, while this game's style is totally different from TRON, it feels really nice. Something I think would be cool is if you start out with just a disc and no shield, but you could find other things during the game, like the shield or another disc.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for the ideas how to make STACK better. You can also share your ideas and suggestions on the STACK discord server. See you there ;)
